arts.ttl: What Kop sang in second half spoke volumes as Liverpool get Arsenal message loud and clear
arts.sum: Ian Doyle with the main talking point after Liverpool extended their lead at the top of the Premier League with victory over Newcastle United at Anfield on Wednesday night

arts.ttl: Szoboszlai and Mac Allister score to help Liverpool strengthen grip on PL title
arts.sum: FREE TO WATCH: Highlights from Liverpool's match against Newcastle in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Liverpool 2-0 Newcastle: Match report & 3 talking points as Reds move 13 points clear
arts.sum: Liverpool continued their march to the Premier League title as they extend their advantage at the top to 13 points by beating Newcastle 2-0. Goals from Dominik

arts.ttl: Liverpool go 13 points clear after Mac Allister completes stroll past Newcastle
arts.sum: Liverpool are disappearing over the horizon, leaving so-called title rivals to fight it out for second place. Arne Slot’s relentless team stretched their lead at the top of the Premier League to 13 points with 10 games remaining with an assured defeat of Newcastle. Arsenal have no chance of bridging the gap. Liverpool appear to be improving. A first-half goal from Dominik Szoboszlai and a fine second half strike from fellow midfielder Alexis Mac Allister sufficed against Eddie Howe’s team, who must hope injured assets and confidence recovers when the two clubs meet again in the Carabao Cup final in 18 days’ time. Liverpool were simply too strong and too solid for their challenge at Anfield. A run of five games in 15 days was portrayed as a defining period in the title race. Liverpool have strengthened their grip on title number 20. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Liverpool beat Newcastle to go 13 points clear
arts.sum: Leaders Liverpool continued their relentless march towards the Premier League title with a 2-0 victory over Newcastle United on Wednesday, moving 13 points clear thanks to goals in each half from Dominik Szoboszlai and Alexis Mac Allister.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot can start planning the party - Liverpool are kings of the Premier League again
arts.sum: LIVERPOOL 2-0 NEWCASTLE: Arne Slot's men took another huge step closer to the Premier League trophy on a night where Arsenal dropped more points in the title race

arts.ttl: Liverpool extend Premier League lead further after swatting aside Newcastle
arts.sum: Arne Slot’s side are now 13 points clear.

arts.ttl: Liverpool’s midfield masterclass puts them on brink of Premier League title
arts.sum: Liverpool 2-0 Newcastle: The Reds extended their lead at the top of the table to 13-points thanks to goals from Dominik Szoboszlai and Alexis Mac Allister

arts.ttl: Liverpool WILL be champions as unsung heroes make Arsenal pay - 5 talking points
arts.sum: LIVERPOOL 2-0 NEWCASTLE UNITED: Liverpool extended their lead at the top of the Premier League table to 13 points thanks to victory at Anfield and Arsenal's failure at Nottingham Forest - we might as well crown them now!

arts.ttl: Newcastle United player ratings slump to 5/10 at Anfield as one Magpies star scores highest
arts.sum: On second inspection Schar could have done more to stop the cross but Pope failed to get a finger on the ball after it had rolled through Dan Burn's legs. Liverpool grabbed the lead on 11 minutes when Luis Diaz beat Fabian Schar on the left before rolling it to Dominik Szoboszlai who sent a left-footed shot past Nick Pope.
